新北市淡水區明德2路41號7樓

dischargeDisposition.text: 出院後繼續來本院門診
出院後繼續來本院門診

note.text: Echocardiography (2025/7/29): AVA 0.78 cm2, mean PG 34.3 mmHg, jet velocity 3.68 m/s. s/p TAVI on 2025/9/23 with 24.5mm MyVAL valve.

code.text: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction

note.text: Under hemodialysis via left AV fistula TIW 135 for 20+ years

coding.display: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary artery without angina pectoris

code.text: Coronary artery disease, double vessel disease

note.text: Initial presented as NSTEMI. CAG on 2025/7/30: LAD 70% stenosis at ostium, 75% stenosis at middle part; LCX 60% stenosis at distal part. s/p DES over LAD-ostial to proximal and BMS over LAD-M on 2025/7/30. Currently under dual-antiplatelet with aspirin, plavix.

coding.display: Chronic viral hepatitis B without delta-agent

note.text: Implanted 24.5mm MyVAL valve. Patient transferred to CVS-A ICU post-procedure for close monitoring, then transferred back to general ward on 9/24.

code.text: PCI with DES and BMS over LAD

note.text: Performed at CGMH. DES over LAD-ostial to proximal and BMS over LAD-M. Currently under dual-antiplatelet therapy.
Part of dual-antiplatelet therapy post PCI
Part of dual-antiplatelet therapy post PCI

dosage.text: 1 tablet three times daily as needed

resource.conclusion: Sinus rhythm. LVH with secondary repolarization abnormality. T wave inversion in lead V1-6, I, aVL.

Borderline heart size. Preserved bilateral CP angle. Tortuosity of thoracic aorta with aortic knob wall calcification. Increased opacity at right paratracheal space. Multiple nodular opacities noted over bilateral hilar regions, probably vascular shadow en face. Increased pulmonary infiltrates at both lung regions.

Pulmonary trunk diameter about 3.4 cm, pulmonary hypertension cannot be ruled out. Atherosclerotic vascular change with mural calcification at coronary arteries and aorta with risk of CAD. Aortic valve and mitral valve calcification. Cardiomegaly. Smaller size with thinning cortex of bilateral kidneys, chronic parenchymal disease considered.

Multifocal plaques with mild luminal narrowing in the bifurcation of bilateral common carotid arteries. Doppler study showed no significant stenosis in cervical portion of bilateral internal carotid arteries, bilateral external carotid arteries and bilateral vertebral arteries.

resource.title: 出院病歷摘要 - TAVI 術前評估

text.div:
【Active Problem】

  1. 嚴重主動脈瓣狹窄（心臟超音波：瓣膜面積 0.78 cm²，平均壓差 34.3mmHg）
  2. 射出分率降低之心臟衰竭（左心室射出分率 32.9%）

【Inactive Problem】

  • 末期腎病，經左側動靜脈廔管血液透析，每週三次
  • 冠狀動脈疾病，2025/7/30 接受經皮冠狀動脈介入治療置放藥物塗層及金屬支架
  • 糖尿病
  • B 型肝炎帶原（不活動期）
呼吸困難及胸悶約兩週，外院告知有主動脈瓣狹窄
病人為 67 歲女性，過去病史如上述。近兩週出現活動時呼吸困難及胸悶症狀，至外院就醫發現主動脈瓣狹窄，轉介至本院心臟血管外科進一步評估是否適合經導管主動脈瓣膜置換術（TAVI）。
安排系列術前檢查。頸動脈超音波顯示雙側總頸動脈有多發性斑塊伴輕度管腔狹窄。二維心臟超音波顯示鈣化的主動脈瓣伴輕度逆流、嚴重瓣膜性主動脈狹窄。胸部電腦斷層顯示肺動脈主幹直徑 3.4 公分、動脈粥樣硬化變化。2025/08/19 進行拔牙作為 TAVI 術前準備。

血液常規 (2025-08-15)

白血球8000 /cumm
紅血球3.56 m/cummL
血紅素10.9 g/dL
血小板222000 /cumm

生化 (2025-08-15)

尿素氮73 mg/dLH
肌酸酐7.92 mg/dLH
血糖116 mg/dLH
鈉134 mmol/LL
鉀4.2 mmol/L
出院後繼續於本院門診追蹤，安排 TAVI 手術

resource.title: 出院病歷摘要 - TAVI 術後

text.div:
【Active Problem】

  1. 嚴重主動脈瓣狹窄 - 2025/9/23 接受 TAVI（24.5mm MyVAL 瓣膜）
  2. 射出分率降低之心臟衰竭

【Inactive Problem】

  • 末期腎病，血液透析中
  • 冠狀動脈疾病，2025/7/30 接受經皮冠狀動脈介入治療
  • 糖尿病
  • B 型肝炎帶原
入院接受經導管主動脈瓣膜置換術（TAVI）
2025-09-23：經導管主動脈瓣膜置換術（TAVI），置入 24.5mm MyVAL 瓣膜
完成術前檢查。9/22 與家屬進行術前說明會議。2025/9/23 進行 TAVI 手術。病人手術過程順利。術後轉至心臟血管外科加護病房密切監測。9/24 轉回普通病房。病人狀況穩定，出院門診追蹤。
2025-09-21：竇性心律。左心室肥厚伴續發性再極化異常。V1-6、I、aVL 導程 T 波倒置。

血液常規 (2025-09-22)

白血球5930 /cumm
血紅素10.2 g/dLL
血小板136000 /cummL

生化

肌酸酐9.65 mg/dLH
高敏感度 CRP (9/24)3.57 mg/dLH
出院後繼續於本院門診追蹤
